title: Varied Mob Sizes
description: Randomly changes all mobs' size slightly for a more emmersive world!
body: ![Sample of Zombies' size variation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd5f87d3fdcbe8c80e1b8f2ecc7bb68472de1c4f.png) --- In this lightweight datapack, mobs will now have slightly varied heights, which allows for a more realistic and emmersive world! \*No\* resource packs required! --- Looking for a Minecraft Server Host? Use my affilate link to try Shockbyte! https://shockbyte.com/billing/aff.php?aff=10878
